title: Department Manager Vacancy at IKEA India Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at IKEA India Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with IKEA India Digital Technologies! We are hiring a Department Manager for our Dhanbad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About IKEA India Digital Technologies:
IKEA India Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IKEA India Digital Technologies!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
